textPlain: Interestingly, this means Saudi Arabia now owns the PGA Tour line of video games.
Welp, EA was already among the worst publishers out there, I can only imagine things will get exponentially worse being owned by private equity.
Interesting to see what effect this has on the games. No more strong female characters?
I mean not for long, right? It's a leveraged buyout so it's only a matter of time until they go bankrupt servicing the loan that was taken out to buy them
